heading: Jan Juc vs Jancourt East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jan Juc, Victoria and Jancourt East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jan Juc has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Jancourt East (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jan Juc or Jancourt East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jan Juc has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Jancourt East scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jan Juc scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Jancourt East scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jan Juc or Jancourt East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jan Juc has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
